sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
sections.subtitleText: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 15g of carbs. the sugar load matters more than you would want. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.
sections.subtitleText: 15g of carbs. the sugar load matters more than you would want. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 0.8g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, the best ones stay sweet without going off the rails.
sections.subtitleText: 0.8g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, the best ones stay sweet without going off the rails.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 40% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is only mild support overall.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 40% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is only mild support overall.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: minerals are basically not part of the case here.
sections.subtitleText: minerals are basically not part of the case here.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: hydrating whole-fruit package because water and whole-food structure make it easier to use well than juice or sweets. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: protein contribution is tiny because that is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth. sugar can climb fast because a lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet. satiety is not especially strong because fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

closing.summary: Mango does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
